caption: The video captures a professional presentation taking place in a conference room or lecture hall. Two presenters, a man and a woman, stand at the front of the room near a table with various items on it, including what appears to be a projector and some documents. The man is actively speaking and gesturing towards the screen, which displays a slide titled "SPDX" related to software package data exchange. The audience, seated in rows of chairs, is attentively listening and some are using laptops and tablets, possibly taking notes or following along with the presentation. The setting suggests an educational or technical seminar focused on software development or licensing standards.
